zh.North Tawton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 塔福頓
zh.London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, Eng: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 凱瑟琳 可利
zh.Collingtree, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾可利崔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Wood於1462年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可利崔時，他的父親John Wood VI37歲，母親Thomasine Crese32歲。他於大約1485年與Johanna Cantelupe在英國諾薩普頓史爾可利崔結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1522年在英國諾薩普頓史爾可利崔享年61歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 凱瑟琳 可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Wood于1462年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可利崔时，他的父亲John Wood VI37岁，母亲Thomasine Crese32岁。他于大约1485年与Johanna Cantelupe在英国諾薩普頓史爾可利崔结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1522年在英国諾薩普頓史爾可利崔享年61岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 凱瑟琳 可利。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Wood was born in 1462, in Collingtree, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wood VI, was 37 and his mother, Thomasine Crese, was 32. He married Johanna Cantelupe about 1485, in Collingtree, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1522, in Collingtree, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Wood est né en 1462, à Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wood VI, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Crese, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Cantelupe environ 1485, à Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1522, à Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Woodが1462年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコリントレで生まれた時，父John Wood VIは37歳，母Thomasine Creseは32歳であった。約1485年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコリントレでJohanna Cantelupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1522年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコリントレで61歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト カスエリン クレにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, Eng: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 캐더이인 크리
ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Wood(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 콜링트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wood VI(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Crese(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 노르섬프토실르 콜링트리에서 Johanna Cantelupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1522년 영국 노르섬프토실르 콜링트리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 캐더이인 크리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Wood nasceu em 1462, em Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wood VI, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Crese, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Cantelupe aproximadamente 1485, em Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1522, em Collingtree, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Katherine Cree, Middlesex, Eng: лондон ст катираин кри, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Wood родился в 1462 г. в местности коллингтри, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wood VI было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Crese, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Cantelupe около 1485 г. в местности коллингтри, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1522 г. в местности коллингтри, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности лондон ст катираин кри, миддлесекс, Англия.
